findings.design_note: D1 of the committed general strong-monoidal pullback build (sec:tensorobj_pullback_monoidality). 7 axiom-clean declarations landed; D2/D3/D4 + IsInvertible.pullback NOT added (Mathlib-absent concrete pointwise model). No sorry pins added.

attempts.strategy: Recognize pushforward₀/restrictScalars as right adjoints so their leftAdjoints (pullback0/extendScalars) exist; first via inferInstanceAs on pushforward (𝟙 ...)
attempts.lean_error: failed to synthesize instance (PresheafOfModules.pushforward₀ Fx Rx).IsRightAdjoint
attempts.insight: Plain infer_instance does not see through pushforward₀ to the pushforward instance; needs an explicit inferInstanceAs bridge.

attempts.strategy: Bridge via inferInstanceAs to pushforward (𝟙 (Fx.op ⋙ Rx)) for pushforward₀, and pushforward (F:=𝟭 C) φ for restrictScalars
attempts.lean_error: failed to synthesize (PresheafOfModules.pushforward ?m.34).IsRightAdjoint — metavariable in F not pinned for the restrictScalars case
attempts.insight: The pushforward₀ case resolved; the restrictScalars case needs explicit (R := Fx.op ⋙ Rx) to pin the ring presheaf so the metavariable is determined.

attempts.strategy: Add explicit (R := Fx.op ⋙ Rx) to the restrictScalars inferInstanceAs
attempts.insight: restrictScalars (𝟙 R) is DEFEQ 𝟭 (witnessed by Mathlib's instance (restrictScalars (𝟙 R)).Full := inferInstanceAs (𝟭 _).Full); this makes both pushforward₀ and restrictScalars recognizable as pushforward instances and hence right adjoints.

attempts.strategy: Build pullback0/extendScalars as .leftAdjoint and assemble pullbackLanDecomposition via leftAdjointCompIso fed Iso.refl of the definitional factorization pushforward φ = pushforward₀ ⋙ restrictScalars
attempts.code_tried: noncomputable def pullbackLanDecomposition ... := Adjunction.leftAdjointCompIso (Iso.refl (pushforward φ)) ; carriers use _root_.PresheafOfModules in type position
attempts.lean_error: Application type mismatch (bare PresheafOfModules shadowed inside namespace) — fixed by _root_.PresheafOfModules type qualifier
attempts.insight: Inside namespace AlgebraicGeometry.Scheme.Modules the bare type PresheafOfModules resolves to a Scheme-indexed thing; type-position uses need _root_.PresheafOfModules (member access PresheafOfModules.pushforward₀ is fine). pullbackLanDecomposition verified {propext, Classical.choice, Quot.sound}.

next_steps: D2 (extendScalars strong monoidal) and D3 (pullback0_tensor_iso) both require a concrete pointwise model of the abstract .leftAdjoint functors — genuinely Mathlib-absent, multi-hundred-LOC (strategy-critic ts244 est ~20-38 iters / ~400-750 LOC). D2: build extendScalarsConcrete φ over CommRingCat bases (value at U = ModuleCat.extendScalars (φ.app U).hom), give .Monoidal via distribBaseChange + naturality, then identify with abstract via leftAdjointUniq. D3: identify pullback0 with Lan F.op, pointwise colimit over up-directed comma category (F↓V), filtered-colimit/⊗ interchange for ModuleCat-valued presheaves. D4 + IsInvertible.pullback are 3-line corollaries once D2+D3 land (pullbackUnitIso, pullbackTensorMap already in hand).

findings.blocker: Mathlib-absent: pullback0 is the abstract (pushforward₀ F R).leftAdjoint with NO pointwise colimit (Lan) formula exposed; the δ₀ iso needs a pointwise Lan model over the up-directed comma category plus filtered-colimit/⊗ interchange for ModuleCat-valued presheaves. Multi-hundred-LOC; not closable axiom-clean in one session; the mathlib-build invariant forbids sorry pins.

attempts.strategy: Not attempted in Lean this iter — handed off as the genuine multi-iteration sub-build after D1 landed.
attempts.insight: Correctly NOT pinned as a sorry; precise next sub-lemmas handed off (Lan identification + filtered-colimit interchange + pullbackObjFreeIso anchor).

next_steps: Build bottom-up: (i) identify pullback0 on underlying Ab-presheaves with Lan F.op; (ii) pointwise Lan colimit over comma category (F↓V) = {U : f⁻¹V ⊆ U}, up-directed; (iii) filtered-colimit/⊗ interchange ⇒ δ₀ iso. Leverage pullbackObjFreeIso for the free/trivial anchor.
